## Player.setStreamPreference() method

Sets the preferred stream for a media type. Optionally flushes the buffer to switch immediately.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setStreamPreference<T extends MediaType>(type: T, params: Omit<ByType<StreamPreference, T>, "type">, flushBuffer?: boolean): void;
```
